age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 28 years for OBC, 30 years for SC
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 28 years SC: 30 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent with proficiency in operation of Computer (Word processing and Spread Sheets) and a speed of 80 words per minute in Stenography (English) and speed of 20 words per minute in transcripting the same. Must have a Certificate of ICT Skills course i.e. Course on Computer Concepts (CCC) 80 hours from a Govt. recognized institution OR a reputed institution which is an ISO 9001 certified OR Department of Electronics Accreditation of Computer Course (DOEACC) of Govt. of India OR from NIELIT and its authorized institutions.
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent. Proficiency in operation of Computer (Word processing and Spread Sheets). Speed of 80 words per minute in Stenography (English). Speed of 20 words per minute in transcripting the same. Certificate of ICT Skills course i.e. Course on Computer Concepts (CCC) 80 hours from a Govt. recognized institution OR a reputed institution which is an ISO 9001 certified OR Department of Electronics Accreditation of Computer Course (DOEACC) of Govt. of India OR from NIELIT and its authorized institutions.

selection_process: Written Test Stenography Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SCDRC Chandigarh Steno-Typist (English) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SCDRC Chandigarh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download SCDRC Chandigarh Steno-Typist (English) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SCDRC Chandigarh Steno-Typist (English) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 24 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent, along with specific computer and stenography skills as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years, and the maximum age is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Steno-Typist post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, followed by a Stenography Test, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Steno-Typist (English) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is as per Pay Level 3 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee for Scheduled Caste and Other Backward Classes. Persons with benchmarks Disabilities are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required computer skills for the Steno-Typist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have proficiency in operating computers, specifically in Word processing and Spread Sheets, and possess a CCC certificate.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required stenography speed?
faq.answer: A speed of 80 words per minute in Stenography (English) and a speed of 20 words per minute in transcripting the same are required.

faq.question: Q9. How should I submit my application?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.
